Video.summary: British sailor Edward falls in love with Manuela Cortez against her father's wishes.
Video.title: Ship of No Return

Video.summary: Mail carrier Silas is threatened by the Waltons, a desperate couple he encounters on the trail.
Video.title: The Jackass Mail

Video.summary: A white man who lives among Native tribes tries to foil a plot to steal gold claims from their land.
Video.title: The Blond King

Video.summary: Steve Hewitt accidentally kills the dogs of miner Tully and is haunted by his mistake.
Video.title: Dogs of the Mist

Video.summary: A couple face opposition to their marriage, the governor of California.
Video.title: Forbidden Wedding

Video.summary: America's first female judge loses her life savings and her husband in a fight against corruption.
Video.title: A Woman's Rights

Video.summary: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.
Video.title: Eagle in the Rocks

Video.summary: Indians attack on a wedding night.
Video.title: Pete Kitchen's Wedding Night

Video.summary: A woman saves her husband from outlaws.
Video.title: The Gentle Sword

Video.summary: A man seeking to open a saloon turns to Harry Bassett, Wyatt Earp and Bat Masterson for help.
Video.title: Extra Guns

Video.summary: As the Donner Party attempts to cross the Sierra Nevada Mountains, and the Reed family is banished.
Video.title: A Girl Named Virginia

Video.summary: A campaign to annex Oregon Territory.
Video.title: Who's Fer Divide?

Video.summary: A colonel deals with Union deserters.
Video.title: The Deserters

Video.summary: A vengeful sea captain goes after the sailors he holds responsible for the loss of his leg.
Video.title: Cap'n Pegleg

Video.summary: When a deadly illness breaks out among the Natives, Lt. Wood is willing to treat them, for a price.
Video.title: The White Healer

Video.summary: A prospector tries to swindle a silver baron.
Video.title: Chicken Bill

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: The story of how the Winchester repeating rifle helped to bring law and order to a new Idaho town.
Video.title: The Thirty-Caliber Town

Video.summary: Pike, an irritable trapper, uses his hot temper to save himself from a run-in with Dakota Indians.
Video.title: Tall Heart, Short Temper

Video.summary: A miner invests his life savings on a tip from a dying criminal.
Video.title: The Secret of the Black Prince

Image.alt: The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince

Video.summary: An Irish miner hopes a man named Ben will help him find gold after Ben demonstrates magical powers.
Video.title: The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch

Image.alt: The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: A set of circumstances prevent friends from keeping control of their potential millions.
Video.title: Ten Day Millionaires

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: A frontier couple battle Natives, outlaws and a government-issued land grant to save their ranch.
Video.title: Here Stands Bailey

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: A peace-seeking Native scout aids pioneers besieged by Native renegades.
Video.title: The Visitor

Video.summary: A cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp and faces the penalty of hanging.
Video.title: Early Candle Lighten

Video.summary: The Chumash Natives, enslaved by Spanish soldiers in California, rebel against their captors.
Video.title: Let My People Go

Video.summary: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.
Video.title: Count Me In, Count Me Out

Image.alt: Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out

Video.summary: A spectacular wrinkle develops around an aging marshal's refusal to wear glasses.
Video.title: Ton of Tin

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past

Video.summary: Gold fever takes hold when Nellie learns that nuggets just lay on the ground in a remote area.
Video.title: The Angel of Tombstone

Video.summary: To avenge his son's death, an embittered rancher sets out to destroy a cowtown.
Video.title: The Oldest Law

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Image.alt: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Video.summary: Red Eagle and Little Fawn fight an unscrupulous businessman to secure an army freight contract.
Video.title: The Contract

Video.summary: A sheriff in Tucson pursues bank robbers and $62,000 in cash, which has been hidden.
Video.title: Up the Chimney
